# Safemed — Software de Segurança e Saúde no Trabalho

> Safemed is a Portuguese SaaS platform for occupational health and safety (OHS/SST) management. It serves companies across Portugal, offering a modular, cloud-based solution that digitizes all aspects of workplace health and safety compliance.

## Company Overview

Safemed develops and maintains a comprehensive occupational health and safety software platform. Founded and based in Porto, Portugal, Safemed serves hundreds of companies across multiple industries including healthcare, manufacturing, construction, aviation, and education.

## Products and Modules

### Core Modules
- **Saúde no Trabalho (Occupational Health)**: Digital clinical files, fitness certificates, smart scheduling, risk mapping, digital signatures, SMS notifications
- **Segurança no Trabalho (Workplace Safety)**: Audits, geographic route mapping, customizable reports, document management
- **Acidentes de Trabalho (Work Accidents)**: Incident registration, investigation reports, full traceability

### Additional Modules
- **Gestão de EPI (PPE Management)**: Distribution tracking, expiry alerts, lifecycle management
- **Produtos Químicos (Chemical Products)**: Safety Data Sheet management, exposure control, CMR classifications
- **My Safemed (Worker Portal)**: Self-service access for workers to view documents and report incidents
- **Easy Booking**: 100% self-service appointment scheduling with SMS/email reminders
- **Segurança Alimentar (Food Safety)**: Visit mapping, route optimization, document management
- **Kube (Analytics)**: Business intelligence, epidemiological studies, custom reports
- **Quizzer (Surveys)**: Mass survey distribution, statistical analysis, automated delivery

## Platform Editions
- **Lite**: For companies with simple internal OHS management
- **Pro**: For service providers and companies with advanced needs
- **Gestão Interna (Internal Management)**: Complete solution for large organizations

## Industries Served
- Service Providers (external OHS companies)
- Hospital Centers
- Manufacturing
- Construction
- Civil Aviation
- Education

## Technology
- 100% cloud-based SaaS platform
- AI-powered assistant (Mivo) for intelligent decision support
- GDPR compliant with end-to-end encryption
- Multi-factor authentication
- Available in Portuguese, English, French, and Spanish
